calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-25-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Eugene A. Vlahos, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff and defendant appeared in pro per. The case settled per the record. Trial date is vacated.
